final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: packaging design presentation / commercial product photography composite
Primary request: full set of four premium organic matcha product packaging displayed together — matcha powder, matcha chocolate, matcha cookies, and matcha tea bags — neatly arranged on a light wood surface
Scene/backdrop: light-toned natural wood tabletop, clean and minimal; scattered fresh tea leaves and loose matcha powder as decorative accents
Subject: four product packages in a cohesive series design, upright and neatly aligned; each package features a hand-drawn illustration of a matcha tea garden with clean elegant linework; trilingual product name typography (Chinese / English / Japanese) using a combination of serif and handwritten typefaces
Style/medium: product mockup composite blending commercial product photography realism with graphic design presentation; Japanese minimalist aesthetic meets contemporary design sensibility
Composition/framing: slightly elevated three-quarter angle, wide enough to show all four products together, balanced symmetrical arrangement
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, clean and refined, fresh and elegant atmosphere
Color palette: layered matcha green tones (deep forest green to pale celadon) as dominant; off-white / cream as secondary; gold foil accents for details
Materials/textures: matte paper packaging with subtle tactile texture; fine traditional Japanese pattern (wagara) printed as background texture on each pack; gold detail lines
Constraints: all four products must be clearly visible and identifiable; packaging must feel cohesive as a series; trilingual labeling must be legible
Avoid: glossy plastic packaging, cluttered background, overly saturated colors, Western-style packaging aesthetic
